description: Software license renewal invoice with per-seat pricing, license key count, and maintenance and support split
parsed_text:
LICENSE RENEWAL INVOICE
Invoice #: LR-2026-00188
Invoice Date: 2026-01-01   Due Date: 2026-01-31
Vendor: Vericore Software Corp.
Vendor Tax ID: XX-XXX4419
Vendor Address: 4000 Innovation Boulevard, Suite 300, San Jose, CA 95134
Sales Contact: renewals@vericoresoftware.com | 408-555-0165
Bill To: Pacific Northwest Insurance Group
   IT Procurement Department
   1200 Fourth Avenue, Suite 2200, Seattle, WA 98101
Account Manager: Sarah Okonkwo
Customer Account #: VCOR-PNIG-1048
PO Number: PO-PNIG-2025-LIC-09
Payment Terms: Net 30   Currency: USD

Product: Vericore Enterprise Risk Platform v8
License Type: Named User — Perpetual with Annual M&S
Renewal Period: January 1, 2026 – December 31, 2026
Previous License Invoice: LR-2025-00144 (Renewed)

Line Items:
1. Software License Renewal — Named Users (90 seats)
   Seat Count: 90 | Per-Seat Rate: $620.00/year             $55,800.00
   License Keys: VCOR-ENT-0901 through VCOR-ENT-0990

2. Annual Maintenance & Support (M&S) — Gold Tier
   Included Coverage: 24x7 phone, upgrades, patches
   M&S Fee: 22% of license value                           $12,276.00
   ($55,800.00 x 22%)

3. Training Credit Pack — 10 hours (Carryover Applied)       ($500.00)
   Per renewal agreement Section 4.2

4. Implementation Consulting — Q1 Onboarding (4 hours)
   @ $275.00/hr                                             $1,100.00

Subtotal:                                                  $68,676.00
CA Sales Tax (9.25% on software only — seats portion):      $5,161.50
Discount — Multi-Year Loyalty (3% on M&S):                  ($368.28)
Invoice Total:                                             $73,469.22
Amount Due:                                                $73,469.22

License keys will be delivered electronically to it-admin@pnig.com within 24 hours of payment receipt.
For licensing questions: licensing@vericoresoftware.com
